calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stuart Bronstein for Scott Mar. Christine Kung Power of Attorney for Anthony Kung.

Ms. Kung stated that the only item in dispute was the $3,482.10 expense for the Lulu Restaurant reception. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-30-2012 Continued To Jun-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Stuart Bronstein for Scott Mar. Christine Kung Power of Attorney for Anthony Kung (present).

Ms. Kung presented her objections to the Amended Accounting Petition. Mr. Bronstein will encourage the Executor to explain to Ms. Kung what happended to the remaining balance in the joint bank account. Mr. Bronstein will provide Ms. Kung with copies of the Bank statements. The Accounting Petition was continued to June 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Kung to review the bank statements and for Ms. Kung to file her objections if any.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Guitron.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-29-2012 Continued To May-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To May-29-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-12-2012 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Feb-27-2012 Continued To Mar-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A Notice to Appear will be issued to the Executor L. Scott Mar and the Attorney Stuart Bronstein to appear on March 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Disrtibution has not been filed. Failure to file said petition will result in sanctions against the Executor and the Attorney in the amount $25.00 per day. Status of closing of the Estate was also continued to March 12, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
